title: murraya alata
intro: Murraya alata, also known as Java orange or orange jasmine, is a flowering plant species in the family Rutaceae. It is native to Southeast Asia and is often used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Murraya alata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, Murraya alata is often used in teas, infusions, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
